risk_summary: Project implementation has been disrupted by security incidents, including bombings targeting the Federal Ministry of Education, Culture, and Higher Education, affecting project continuity and staff safety.
evidence_quote: the project was disrupted by delayed elections, prolonged budgetary approvals (January 2021 to June 30, 2022), and security incidents, including bombings targeting the Federal Ministry of Education, Culture, and Higher Education.

risk_summary: Political instability and delayed elections have caused prolonged budgetary approval delays and disrupted project implementation timelines.
evidence_quote: the project was disrupted by delayed elections, prolonged budgetary approvals (January 2021 to June 30, 2022), and security incidents

risk_title: Gender-based violence (GBV) risks in teacher training centers not adequately addressed
risk_summary: The World Bank has not been able to verify whether social risks, particularly GBV risks, have been addressed in the teacher training component, and GBV service providers have not been contracted, creating safeguarding gaps.
evidence_quote: the mission has also not been able to ascertain whether the intended beneficiaries of this training have met their training goals, have the expected qualifications, and have been deployed into classrooms, as planned... Moreover, the mission has not been able to verify whether social risks, in particular GBV risks, have been addressed in this component.

risk_title: Governance fragility and lack of institutional capacity affecting teacher training oversight
risk_summary: Teacher training centers lack basic governance structures, administrative oversight, and reporting mechanisms, with staff resignations due to salary delays and absence of chain of command, indicating governance fragility.
evidence_quote: Administrative staff and coaches at Hirshabelle TTC resigned after not receiving their salaries for a period of three and half months... There was no established chain of command to address challenges or report issues within the institution.

risk_title: Tensions between World Bank and government over teacher training implementation
risk_summary: Significant tensions have emerged between the World Bank and government regarding teacher training quality and accountability, leading to the World Bank's decision to discontinue support to Teacher Training Colleges and Trainers of Teachers due to lack of progress on key agreements and systematic reporting.
evidence_quote: the World Bank project will discontinue the current support to Teacher Training Colleges and Trainers of Teachers starting on January 1, 2025. This is due to a lack of progress on key agreements, lack of systematic reporting arrangements, and identified social risks.

risk_title: Governance challenges in project management affecting implementation
risk_summary: Poor management practices at the Project Management Unit, including lack of reporting, late submissions of requests, and lack of progress on key activities, suggest governance fragility affecting project delivery.
evidence_quote: Recent lack of progress cannot be traced to any external factors and suggests that one of the key factors is poor management practices at the PMU. This is evidenced by continued lack of reporting, late submissions of requests and lack of progress in key activities.
